content.problemStatement:
Chef had NNN rupees with him.

He decided to buy AAA ice creams for his friends, each at a cost of BBB rupees. He was able to pay the entire amount.

Find how many rupees Chef still has left with him at the end?


Input Format

The first and only line of input contains 333 integers - N,AN, AN,A and BBB.


Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the amount of rupees Chef has left.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Chef had 100100100 rupees, and he spent 5⋅2=105 \cdot 2 = 105⋅2=10 rupees. So, he still has 100−10100 - 10100−10 rupees left over.

Explanation:
Chef had 101010 rupees, and he spent the entire amount. Thus, he has 000 rupees left.
